# MADAR AI Automation

> شركة سعودية متخصصة في بناء أنظمة أتمتة الأعمال بالذكاء الاصطناعي — وكلاء واتساب AI، أتمتة CRM، حجز مواعيد ذكي، ومساعدي مبيعات. نتائج مضمونة خلال 30 يوماً.

MADAR is a Saudi Arabian AI automation company based in Jeddah. We build custom AI systems that transform business operations — WhatsApp AI agents, CRM automation, intelligent appointment booking, and AI sales assistants. We serve 8+ industries across Saudi Arabia with guaranteed results in 30 days.

## About MADAR

- **Company name**: MADAR AI Automation (مدار)
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Location**: Jeddah, Saudi Arabia (جدة، المملكة العربية السعودية)
- **Website**: https://madar.software
- **Phone / WhatsApp**: +966 54 666 6005
- **Email**: info@madar.ai
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/madar.software
- **TikTok**: https://www.tiktok.com/@madar.solution
- **Languages**: Arabic (primary), English

## Services

### 1. AI Customer Agents (وكلاء ذكاء اصطناعي للعملاء)
24/7 instant, intelligent, personalized responses. AI agent handles every inquiry in under 1 second, manages objections, and guides customers toward purchase. Supports Arabic and English, integrates with CRM. Most requested service among Saudi clients.

### 2. Smart WhatsApp Automation (أتمتة واتساب الذكية)
Automated WhatsApp responses from first message through booking and follow-up. Automatic replies 24 hours a day, sales follow-up, and live analytics. Ideal for clinics, real estate, restaurants, and e-commerce in Saudi Arabia.

### 3. AI Appointment Booking (نظام حجز المواعيد بالذكاء الاصطناعي)
Customers book their own appointments automatically via WhatsApp — reminders, rescheduling, and confirmation happen without staff. 24/7 booking, automatic pre-appointment reminders, 80% reduction in no-shows. Perfect for medical clinics, beauty salons, and training centers.

### 4. CRM Automation (أتمتة إدارة علاقات العملاء)
Automatic customer registration, sales tracking, and customer behavior analysis in one dashboard. Automatic data entry, detailed sales reports, customer segmentation, and sales pipeline tracking.

### 5. AI Sales Assistant (مساعد المبيعات بالذكاء الاصطناعي)
Smart sales agent that automatically follows up with prospects, sends personalized offers, and closes deals — a sales employee who never tires or sleeps. Automatic follow-up, custom offers, and sales pipeline analysis.

### 6. Mobile Apps iOS & Android (تطبيقات الجوال)
Professional mobile apps for your business on iOS and Android — fast, beautiful, and fully integrated with AI systems and WhatsApp.

## Industries Served (القطاعات التي نخدمها)

1. **Medical Clinics & Hospitals** — Automatic appointment booking 24/7, patient reminders, instant inquiry responses. Increases bookings 3x and reduces manual calls by 80%.
2. **Real Estate & Development** — Smart real estate agent working around the clock — receives prospects, qualifies them, and schedules tours automatically.
3. **Restaurants & Cafes** — Automatic WhatsApp order reception, reservation management, and daily offer sending.
4. **E-commerce** — Automatic product inquiry responses, order tracking, and personalized offer sending.
5. **Education & Training** — Automatic student registration, lecture reminders, and student performance tracking.
6. **Health & Fitness** — Training session booking, nutrition plan tracking, subscription reminder sending.
7. **Automotive** — Automatic responses to car inquiries, scheduling test drives and maintenance appointments.
8. **Service Companies** — Inquiry automation, automatic quote sending, and service request management.

## How MADAR Works (كيف نعمل — 3 خطوات)

1. **Free Business Analysis (30 minutes)** — Strategic session to understand your operations, weaknesses, and goals. We identify where AI can make the biggest impact and create a measurable plan.
2. **Design & Build (7–14 days)** — Our team designs and builds a custom AI system for your business — from code to interfaces and integrations. Everything is built and thoroughly tested before delivery.
3. **Launch & Automate (ongoing)** — We launch the system, monitor its performance, train your team, and provide continuous support for best results.

## Key Differentiators

- **100% custom-built** systems, not off-the-shelf solutions
- **Guaranteed results** within 30 days
- **Arabic-first** — specialized in Arabic content and Saudi market
- **Full integration** — WhatsApp Business API, CRM, databases, calendars
- **Continuous support** after delivery
- **Multi-industry expertise** — 8+ sectors served

## Pricing

Three packages available:
- **Starter** — For startups and small businesses
- **Growth** — For growing businesses (most popular)
- **Enterprise** — For large companies

All projects are custom-quoted. Free consultation available — no commitment required.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How long does it take to implement an automation system?**
A: We start with a free analysis and deliver the system within 7–21 days depending on project complexity, with comprehensive testing before delivery.

**Q: Does WhatsApp bot work with medical clinics?**
A: Yes, we build specialized WhatsApp AI systems for clinics including: automatic 24/7 appointment booking, patient reminders 24 hours before appointments, and instant inquiry responses — reducing manual calls by 80% and tripling bookings.

**Q: Can sales be automated via WhatsApp in Saudi Arabia?**
A: Yes, MADAR specializes in building automated sales systems via WhatsApp for Saudi companies — from receiving prospects to qualification, sending offers, and closing deals automatically.

**Q: What sets MADAR apart from other automation companies?**
A: MADAR builds fully custom systems for your business — not ready-made solutions. We guarantee results within 30 days and provide continuous support. Our team specializes in the Saudi market and Arabic content.

**Q: What is the cost of a WhatsApp bot for businesses in Saudi Arabia?**
A: Cost varies by project requirements and business size. We offer a free consultation to assess your needs and provide an appropriate price. Contact us via WhatsApp at +966546666005.
